name: StubHub Holdings, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview We believe we operate the largest global secondary ticketing marketplace for live events. We connect fans around the world with sellers who use our marketplace to reach passionate fans and price tickets efficiently. Our mission is to be the global destination for consumers to access live events and experiences.
